tasks.title: Write or refine the project objective in the PRD file
tasks.notes: The prompt generator reads the PRD file directly.

tasks.title: Replace this seed task list with repo-specific work
tasks.notes: Keep statuses current so fresh Codex runs can resume deterministically.

tasks.title: Detect nested project roots so Ralph can inspect the starter extension from the repo root
tasks.notes: Workspace scanning now selects the nested `ralph-codex-vscode-starter` project root when the repo root has no shallow markers, and the runtime build was refreshed so the extension uses the updated scan path.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for nested workspace scanning and prompt repo-context rendering
tasks.notes: Locked in nested root-selection evidence plus prompt repo-context rendering for inspected-root versus workspace-root cases.

tasks.title: Cover clipboard and IDE handoff strategies with automated tests and explicit docs
tasks.notes: Added command-shell smoke coverage for prompt clipboard auto-copy plus Open Codex IDE clipboard-only, IDE-command, missing-command fallback, and cliExec-warning handoff paths, and documented the operator-facing handoff rules and remaining live-host gaps.

tasks.title: Prove the packaging path and document the manual `.vsix` install workflow
tasks.notes: Documented the operator-facing `npm run package` plus manual `.vsix` install workflow, hardened the package script for this repo by using `vsce package --no-dependencies`, added repository metadata plus README links that `vsce` can rewrite, and validated a fresh `ralph-codex-workbench-0.1.0.vsix` build. Packaging still warns about a missing LICENSE file and the lack of `.vscodeignore` or a `files` allowlist.

tasks.title: Exercise a real CLI iteration against a temp workspace and tighten any artifact or verifier gaps it exposes
tasks.notes: Added an optional `npm run test:real-cli-smoke` temp-workspace runner that drives the actual `codex exec` path, documented its operator use and environment limits, and surfaced summarized execution failure messages into the structured iteration/latest-result/status artifacts. A real smoke run in this sandbox exercised the path and preserved a temp workspace with the expected backend-connect failure evidence.

tasks.title: Align nested inspection-root and execution-root semantics across prompting, execution, and verification
tasks.notes: Ralph now persists explicit workspace/inspection/execution/verification root policy in prompt evidence, execution plans, CLI invocation artifacts, iteration results, and provenance bundles. `codex exec` plus validation/git verifiers run from the selected inspection root while `.ralph` stays anchored at the workspace root, and `ralphCodex.inspectionRootOverride` now provides a deterministic manual override for ambiguous umbrella workspaces with evidence, status, docs, and regression coverage.

tasks.title: Persist chosen inspection root in prompt evidence, execution plans, provenance bundles, and status surfaces
tasks.notes: Added explicit root-policy persistence covering workspace, inspection, execution, and verification roots in prompt evidence, execution plans, CLI invocation artifacts, iteration results, provenance bundles, and status summaries.

tasks.title: Define deterministic execution-root and verifier-root policy for nested repos
tasks.notes: Locked in a simple policy: execution root and verifier root follow the selected inspection root; workspace root continues to own `.ralph` control-plane state and artifacts.

tasks.title: Implement CLI and verifier root-alignment using the chosen root policy
tasks.notes: CLI execution now passes the selected execution root into `codex exec --cd`, and validation/git verifiers run from the selected verification root instead of depending on manual `cd ... && ...` command composition.

tasks.title: Add an explicit inspection-root override for ambiguous umbrella or multi-repo workspaces
tasks.notes: Added the `ralphCodex.inspectionRootOverride` setting, validated it against the workspace boundary, let it override shallow root scoring when valid, and surfaced applied/invalid override state in workspace-scan evidence and status output.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for nested execution-root, verifier-root, and override behavior
tasks.notes: Regression coverage now includes applied and invalid inspection-root override scanning, status rendering for override state, nested execution-root and verifier-root persistence, and an end-to-end CLI iteration proving override-driven execution/verifier cwd selection.

tasks.title: Document workspace-root, inspection-root, execution-root, and verifier-root behavior
tasks.notes: Updated README plus architecture, provenance, and verifier docs so nested-root execution semantics, the workspace-root `.ralph` boundary, and the `inspectionRootOverride` escape hatch are explicit.

tasks.title: Defer broad multi-agent orchestration until nested root semantics are deterministic and evidence-backed
tasks.notes: Locked the current product boundary to a sequential single-agent loop, documented that broader multi-agent orchestration remains deferred until nested workspace/inspection/execution/verification root policy is deterministic, test-backed, and evidence-backed, and added docs-validation coverage so that guardrail stays explicit.

tasks.title: Add an explicit inspection-root override for ambiguous umbrella or multi-repo workspaces
tasks.notes: Satisfied by the `ralphCodex.inspectionRootOverride` implementation completed under T8.4; retained here only as the previously-recorded duplicate follow-on item.

tasks.title: Add bounded retention for iteration, prompt, and transcript artifacts so repeated Ralph loops do not grow unbounded
tasks.notes: Surfaced generated artifact retention in Show Status, added explicit enabled/disabled coverage, and aligned testing docs with the existing prompt/run/iteration cleanup behavior.

tasks.title: Protect latest-linked artifacts and state-referenced run files when non-provenance retention cleanup executes
tasks.notes: Added explicit regression and doc coverage proving latest-preflight-report.json protects only the referenced iteration directory during generated-artifact cleanup; npm test passed.

tasks.title: Identify the protected latest pointers and state references that non-provenance cleanup must honor
tasks.notes: Enumerate exactly which latest-pointer JSON artifacts and `.ralph/state.json` references count as protected roots for generated prompts, run transcripts/last-message pairs, and iteration directories.

tasks.title: Define deterministic retention precedence rules when generated-artifact cleanup and protected references conflict
tasks.notes: Made generated-artifact retention precedence explicit in the high-level README and architecture docs: Ralph keeps the newest parsed-iteration window first, then adds older protected references without evicting newer retained entries.

tasks.title: Implement protected-artifact retention for latest-linked prompts, summaries, transcripts, and iteration directories
tasks.notes: Update non-provenance cleanup so it preserves the newest prompt, transcript/last-message pair, preflight/summary surface, or iteration directory still referenced by stable latest pointers or workspace state.

tasks.title: Add targeted regression coverage for protected latest-linked and state-referenced generated artifacts
tasks.notes: Added focused artifact-retention regressions for latest-linked prompt/summary/preflight references and state-referenced transcript, last-message, and iteration-directory roots; updated testing docs accordingly.

tasks.title: Detect and repair stale latest-artifact pointers when operators manually delete generated Ralph files
tasks.notes: Added deterministic repair for deleted latest summary/provenance summary surfaces from surviving latest JSON metadata, wired status/open-latest flows through that repair path, and covered manual-deletion regressions.

tasks.title: Expand Show Status with recent iteration and run history plus artifact-retention summaries
tasks.notes: Expanded Show Status with recent iteration/run history, live generated-artifact and provenance-bundle retention summaries, and latest-artifact repair/stale reporting; added rendering tests and aligned workflow/testing docs.

tasks.title: Add direct commands to open the latest prompt evidence and latest CLI transcript or last-message artifacts
tasks.notes: Added direct commands to open the latest prompt-evidence artifact and the latest CLI transcript with last-message fallback, plus registration/docs/smoke coverage.

tasks.title: Surface stale-artifact and retention-readiness diagnostics in preflight before a loop starts
tasks.notes: Added preflight artifact-readiness diagnostics for stale latest surfaces, missing latest-pointer targets, unsafe retention-root overlap, and disabled retention settings; wired them into iteration-start and status preflight paths; added regression coverage and doc updates.

tasks.title: Add a scoped cleanup workflow that prunes generated runtime artifacts without fully resetting durable loop state
tasks.notes: Added a scoped Cleanup Runtime Artifacts command that preserves durable Ralph state and latest evidence while pruning older generated prompts, run artifacts, iteration directories, provenance bundles, and logs; added regression coverage and updated docs.

tasks.title: Cover retention, stale-pointer recovery, latest-artifact commands, and scoped cleanup with regression tests
tasks.notes: Aligned AGENTS.md with the new latest-artifact and cleanup command surface added for T18; npm run validate passes cleanly on the current worktree.

tasks.title: Document artifact lifecycle, retention, recovery, and cleanup workflows for long-running Ralph loops
tasks.notes: README plus focused docs should explain what Ralph retains, what cleanup may delete, how stale artifacts are repaired, and which inspection commands to use during a long loop.

tasks.title: Remove the remaining `.vsix` packaging warnings and revalidate the release-build workflow after artifact-lifecycle changes
tasks.notes: Removed the remaining vsce packaging warnings by adding a bundled MIT LICENSE file and a package.json files allowlist, updated release-build docs to describe the curated VSIX payload, and revalidated with npm run package plus npm run check:docs.

tasks.title: Add a bounded task-remediation pass for repeatedly failing or no-progress Ralph tasks
tasks.notes: Added a bounded, deterministic task-remediation recommendation for repeated no-progress and repeated identical failure outcomes, surfaced it in iteration/state artifacts and status/prompt context, and covered it with tests and docs.

tasks.title: Define deterministic triggers and outcomes for task remediation
tasks.notes: Specify when remediation activates, such as repeated no_progress, repeated identical failure signatures, or repeated blocked starts on the same task. Define allowed outcomes: decompose_task, reframe_task, mark_blocked, request_human_review, or no_action.

tasks.title: Add remediation evidence artifacts and status reporting
tasks.notes: Persist a remediation proposal artifact with the triggering history, rationale, proposed action, and any suggested child tasks. Surface the latest remediation status in Show Status and latest-summary flows.

tasks.title: Implement bounded task-decomposition proposals for overly broad failed tasks
tasks.notes: Implemented bounded structured child-task proposals for repeated no-progress remediation artifacts, surfaced proposal details in status output, updated docs, and validated with npm run validate.

tasks.title: Add a human-reviewed apply path for accepted decomposition proposals
tasks.notes: Added an explicit operator-approved command that applies the latest accepted decomposition proposal into .ralph/tasks.json while keeping remediation defaulted to propose-only.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for remediation triggers, proposal artifacts, and approved task decomposition
tasks.notes: Cover repeated no_progress, repeated failure signatures, blocked-start cases, proposal generation, non-decomposition cases, and approved application into tasks.json.

tasks.title: Document task remediation, decomposition limits, and human-approval boundaries
tasks.notes: Documented remediation triggers, bounded outcomes, proposal artifacts, operator approval flow, and the hard limits that keep remediation deterministic and non-chaotic across README plus verifier and workflow docs.

tasks.title: Document task remediation, decomposition limits,
tasks.notes: Closed the bounded-decomposition wording gap by documenting the deterministic reproduce-fix-rerun sequence directly in the remediation docs and validating it with the docs checker.

tasks.title: Human-approval boundaries
tasks.notes: Documented the operator-reviewed apply path and explicit no-auto-rewrite boundaries so remediation remains propose-only until a human accepts the decomposition.

tasks.title: Add token-budgeted prompt and context generation for Ralph CLI and IDE handoff flows
tasks.notes: Implemented prompt-budget policy, bounded objective/progress/prior-evidence summarization, task-aware repo-context trimming, prompt-budget evidence artifacts, default-medium CLI reasoning effort, status visibility, regression coverage, and operator docs. Validation passed with npm run validate.

tasks.title: Define prompt-budget policy and minimum required context for each prompt kind
tasks.notes: Defined deterministic prompt-budget policies for each prompt kind and target, including required sections, optional sections, omission order, and minimum-context bias persisted in prompt evidence.

tasks.title: Implement compact objective, progress, and prior-evidence summarization for prompt rendering
tasks.notes: Replaced large objective/progress snapshots with bounded summaries and filtered prior-iteration context toward the selected task and recent failure pattern.

tasks.title: Make repo-context sections task-aware and omit irrelevant fields by default
tasks.notes: Made repo-context selection task-aware so docs-focused prompts skip irrelevant code/package inventory while code-focused work still keeps source and validation context.

tasks.title: Add prompt-size accounting and prompt-budget evidence artifacts
tasks.notes: Persisted prompt byte counts, estimated token range, budget outcome, section selection, omission order, and budget mode in prompt-evidence and surfaced the same inspection path in Show Status.

tasks.title: Default CLI reasoning effort to medium and make high an explicit escalation path
tasks.notes: Added default-medium CLI reasoning effort, threaded it through codex exec as model_reasoning_effort, persisted the chosen value in invocation/integrity artifacts, and documented high as an explicit escalation path.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for prompt budgeting, section omission, and reasoning-effort defaults
tasks.notes: Added regression coverage for prompt-budget policy selection, oversized-prompt trimming, task-aware section inclusion, prompt-budget evidence persistence, status rendering, and default-versus-escalated reasoning behavior.

tasks.title: Document prompt-budget policy, context selection rules, and quota-saving operator guidance
tasks.notes: Documented prompt-budget policy, omission order, reasoning-effort defaults, and quota-sensitive operator guidance in workflows and provenance docs.

tasks.title: Reproduce the blocker with a deterministic verification target
tasks.notes: Documented that bounded decomposition should start by reproducing the blocker against the inherited validation command, and added docs-validator coverage so the deterministic verification-target rule stays enforced.

tasks.title: Implement the smallest bounded fix for that narrowed blocker
tasks.notes: Documented that the next narrowed child should implement the smallest bounded fix for the reproduced blocker instead of bundling extra cleanup or another planning pass.

tasks.title: Rerun verification and capture the bounded evidence
tasks.notes: Revalidated the remediation-doc branch with npm run check:docs after reconciling the ledger so the reproduce-fix-rerun sequence is evidenced by the docs checker.

tasks.title: Define prompt-budget policy
tasks.notes: Defined per-kind per-target prompt-budget policies with explicit token targets, context bias, required sections, and optional omission order.

tasks.title: Minimum required context for each prompt kind
tasks.notes: Locked the minimum required prompt sections so quota trimming never drops strategy, preflight, objective, task, operating rules, execution contract, or final response contract.

tasks.title: Harden task-ledger integrity so tracker drift cannot silently exhaust or misstate the backlog
tasks.notes: Recent backlog replenishment was triggered by task-ledger drift rather than missing implementation. Ralph should detect inconsistent done-versus-descendant state, surface it before selection, and document the repair path.

tasks.title: Detect done parent tasks that still have unfinished descendants
tasks.notes: Extend task-graph inspection so a parent marked done while any descendant remains todo, in_progress, or blocked is treated as durable tracker drift instead of a clean graph.

tasks.title: Surface task-ledger drift in preflight, status, and backlog-replenishment context
tasks.notes: Surfaced task-ledger drift explicitly in preflight summaries, status output, and replenish-backlog prompt selection/strategy so inconsistent ledgers no longer read as clean backlog exhaustion. Added regression coverage for the new wording and prompt decision path.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for ledger-drift diagnostics and exhausted-backlog handling
tasks.notes: Cover done-parent-with-open-descendants task graphs plus replenish-backlog and status behavior so the recent drift-triggered exhaustion path stays deterministic.

tasks.title: Document task-ledger integrity rules and the repair path for drifted backlogs
tasks.notes: Explain parent-versus-descendant completion rules, the expected preflight/status warnings, and when operators should replenish backlog versus repair inconsistent tasks.
